{{Quote|For whatever reason, Sordaan, the lead Rodian hunter here on Kashyyyk, has declared Kashyyyk bantha off limits to Rodian hunters. Don't ask me why. Something to do with a childhood tragedy or something.|[[Kerssoc]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:RotW" />}}
'''Kashyyyk Bantha''' was a subspecies of [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] native to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. They were much larger than the banthas on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and had slightly shorter fur. They should not be confused with the [[Kashyyyk greyclimber]], which was also referred to as a "Kashyyyk bantha." Whereas the true Kashyyyk bantha had three straight, smooth horns, the Kashyyyk greyclimber had two massive slabs of bone on the top of its head to be used as a battering ram. It was believed that the planet's bantha population had grown from specimens brought back to Kashyyyk by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] traders. Their massive sizes made them good war steeds. The Jedi [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]] even rode one into battle at the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]].

==Behind the scenes==
The "Kashyyyk bantha" in ''The Hidden Enemy'' had three horns, contradicting the ''Gamer'' [[Kashyyyk greyclimber|depiction and description]] in ''The New Essential Guide to Alien Species''. The Kashyyyk banthas that appear in the ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' expansion [[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees|''Rage of the Wookiees'']] also have. Thus, the term does not refer to one particular sub-species, but simply to banthas located on Kashyyyk.
